description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Once the Operator Hot Wallet has been added as an Operator of the stUSDS BEAM (see [A.4.4.1.3.8

.2 - Operator Hot Wallet](bddf50ca-02ef-4991-abb0-53e09831ee6f)), the stUSDS parameters set by the stUSDS BEAM must be set by the Operator Hot Wallet. These changes must be based on the update methodology specified in [A.4.4.1.3.8
- Update Methodology](e37d1045-215d-4f85-bbc3-70aa2c1b818b) and the results must be publicly visible on an information dashboard.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
